title: Autonumber and keep it static on items added to a board, moving between groups
excerpt:
Is there a way to use the Monday.com Auto-number feature and keep that number static on items added to a board, where you can then move the items between groups (in that same board), where the number doesn’t change? 
Exa…

posts.author: MaryValentine (Mary Valentine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to use the Monday.com Auto-number feature and keep that number static on items added to a board, where you can then move the items between groups (in that same board), where the number doesn’t change?
Example:
Group A Section:
Item Auto-Number
abc 12
def 13
ghi 14

Group B Section:
Item Auto-Number
jkl 15
mno 16
pqr 17

Now I want to move an item from Group A Section with auto-number 14, into Group B Section and keep that auto-number 14 on that item.
Seems that when I move that item, Monday.com will re-number it to 18 (i.e. the auto-number following the item above it).

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MaryValentine how aré you. Because the Monday.com autoid native column doesnt Solve your needs there Is an app developed by @basdebruin that it does.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MaryValentine The marketplace link to this app is at We make your teams excel - Excellent Team - Home

You can also browse to our webstore to get detailed information about this app.
